title: Property Tax Exemption for Disabled Veterans
summary: Florida offers property tax exemptions for certain disabled veterans, including a full exemption for qualifying 100% P&T veterans.

requirements.notes: Florida also offers partial exemptions for combat-related disabilities (10%+); full exemption applies to 100% P&T.

eligibilityNotes: Apply through the County Property Appraiser. Documentation from the VA is required.

title: Motor Vehicle Registration Fee Exemption (Disabled Veterans)
summary: Eligible disabled veterans may receive an exemption from certain vehicle registration fees in Florida.

requirements.notes: Applies to one vehicle owned by the veteran.

eligibilityNotes: Disabled Veteran license plates are required. Apply through the Florida DHSMV.

title: Disabled Veteran License Plate
summary: Special license plate for veterans with qualifying service-connected disabilities, providing parking and fee benefits.
eligibilityNotes: Issued by the Florida DHSMV with VA disability verification.

title: Florida State Parks Lifetime Pass (Disabled Veterans)
summary: Lifetime free admission to Florida State Parks for eligible disabled veterans.
eligibilityNotes: Pass issued by Florida State Parks with VA documentation.

title: Hunting & Fishing License Exemption (Disabled Veterans)
summary: Eligible disabled veterans may receive free or reduced-cost hunting and fishing licenses in Florida.

requirements.notes: Some licenses may require additional endorsements.

eligibilityNotes: Issued through the Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission (FWC).

title: Florida Veterans’ Preference in Employment
summary: Eligible veterans may receive hiring preference for public employment in Florida.

requirements.notes: Disabled veterans and certain spouses/survivors may receive additional preference.

eligibilityNotes: Applies to state and local government positions. Documentation required during application.

title: Florida State Veterans’ Homes
summary: State-operated long-term care facilities for eligible veterans and eligible spouses.

requirements.notes: Admission depends on eligibility determination, medical need, and bed availability.

eligibilityNotes: Applicants must meet VA and Florida eligibility requirements. Spouses may be eligible in certain cases.

title: Florida National & State Veterans Cemeteries
summary: Veterans cemeteries providing burial options for eligible veterans and family members in Florida.

requirements.notes: Eligibility generally mirrors VA national cemetery rules.

eligibilityNotes: Pre-need eligibility determination is recommended. Availability varies by location.
